overrideJustification: VAL-GUI-FOUND-004 and VAL-GUI-PRIM-001 moved to gui-core-pages milestone (gui-agents-issues-pages feature) where per-component cleanup will comprehensively address remaining non-contract colors and button styling across all pages. 12/14 foundation assertions pass. The remaining 2 require page-level component work that belongs in the next milestone.

failedAssertions.reason: All audited indicators retained 6x6 size and 0px border-radius, but dashboard includes 6x6 square indicators with non-contract colors (#EF4444, #F97316, #EAB308, #6B7280, #3B82F6) instead of only alive #82E88A, dead #FF6060, or idle transparent+border.
Computed-style audit failed for 34 of 39 visible buttons across Dashboard/Agents/Issues; most failures were non-white border color and non-uppercase text.

frictions.description: agent-browser `get html @ref` did not accept snapshot refs in this run (selector parsing error), so style evidence relied on `eval` computed-style audits.
frictions.resolution: Used `agent-browser eval` scripts to extract computed styles directly from DOM.

frictions.description: agent-browser network history was sparse in one capture; explicit in-page fetch provided deterministic network evidence.
frictions.resolution: Executed fetch("/api/health") and saved both response payload and updated network request log.
